About the firm

A professional practice that treats your business like its own.

MyFINANCE Online is a Bloemfontein-based accounting practice serving owner-managed businesses across South Africa. We combine the rigour of a registered professional firm with the convenience of cloud accounting and a secure client portal.

Credentials

  • ● SAIPA Professional Accountant (SA)
  • ● Commissioner of Oaths
  • ● Registered SARS tax practitioner
  • ● Based in Bloemfontein, Free State
Our approach

Compliance handled, so you can focus on the business.

Most business owners don’t want to think about accounting — they want it done, done right, and done on time. That’s the brief we work to. We take care of the books, the tax and the statutory filings in the background, and surface only the numbers and decisions that matter to you.

Working in the cloud means you’re never tied to a desktop or a filing cabinet. Share documents securely, approve work online and see exactly where things stand — from anywhere, on any device.

And because we’re a registered professional practice, you get more than data capture: you get judgement, accountability and someone who will represent you to SARS when it counts.

Accountable

A registered SAIPA Professional Accountant (SA) stands behind every set of figures and every submission.

Accessible

Real answers from a real person — not a call-centre ticket. We know your business by name.

Ahead of the deadline

We track the SARS and CIPC calendar for you and act early, so compliance is calm rather than a crisis.

Work with a firm that knows you by name.

Get in touch and let’s talk about what your business needs.

Request a quote Contact us

Accountants & business advisors — cloud accounting, tax, payroll and advisory for South African business owners.
